item.title: The 'Red Alert' Urgent Phishing Campaign: Analysis of an Iranian-Linked Android Infostealer
item.description: A deep dive into the manifest and decompiled Java code of a recent credential harvesting campaign. CHANGE THIS LATER

item.title: Contact Me
item.description:
Feel free to reach out in one of these ways:

  • LinkedIn: Profile
  • Email: yaxyz@yourdomain.com
  • GitHub: github.com/YaxyZ
